node.text: Jolene is experiencing a new level of joy and happiness.

node.text: Jolene is studying hard for upcoming finals and plans to take a trip to relax and recharge afterward.

node.text: Jolene found inspiration and refreshment in the beauty of nature at the retreat.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "been to France") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.53)

node.text: Jolene finds inspiration in the small things and believes in continuous growth through obstacles.
Jolene was reminded at the retreat to appreciate the journey and not just focus on the finish line, as she tends to get consumed with hitting her goals.
Jolene enjoys taking little trips to the beach with her partner to relax.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "France visit travel") on Session 23 (Score: 0.51)

node.text: Jolene's room is her haven for peace and rest where she goes to relax and recharge after a busy day.
Jolene recently presented at a virtual conference and received positive feedback, confirming she is on the right track.
